subjects.description: nomadic rider crossing the Gobi Desert at sunset
subjects.appearance_details: determined rider in layered traditional nomadic garments, wind-shaped fabric, steady posture, and sunlit profile
subjects.relationship: human rider guiding the stallion through open desert terrain
subjects.location: center frame on the moving horse across golden sand
subjects.relative_size: medium human figure paired with a large horse in a vast landscape
subjects.orientation: facing forward across the desert with face turned slightly toward the low sun
subjects.pose: upright in the saddle with hands controlling the reins
subjects.action: rides confidently across rugged sand and sparse desert vegetation
subjects.state_changes: clothing flutters, body rises and settles with the horse gait, face catches warmer sunset light
subjects.clothing: traditional nomadic robe, sash, boots, and head covering suited for desert travel
subjects.expression: determined, free, and focused on the horizon
subjects.skin_tone_and_texture: sun-warmed skin with wind-weathered realistic texture
subjects.facial_features: strong profile, narrowed eyes, set mouth, and cheeks lit by sunset

subjects.description: powerful chestnut stallion galloping over desert sand
subjects.appearance_details: muscular chestnut body, glossy coat, flowing mane and tail, strong hooves kicking small arcs of sand
subjects.relationship: mount carrying the nomadic rider across the Gobi Desert
subjects.location: beneath the rider in the center foreground
subjects.relative_size: large animal subject, visually dominant with the rider
subjects.orientation: moving forward across the frame toward the sunset horizon
subjects.pose: galloping with head lifted and legs extended through sand
subjects.action: runs steadily across dunes and stony patches while responding to the reins
subjects.state_changes: mane and tail stream in wind, hooves strike sand, dust trails form and fade
subjects.clothing: leather saddle, simple bridle, reins, and practical travel tack
subjects.skin_tone_and_texture: chestnut coat with sunlit highlights, fine dust, and visible muscle texture
subjects.facial_features: dark eyes, flared nostrils, and wind-tossed forelock

background_setting: The Gobi Desert stretches in all directions with vast golden sand, ancient rocks, sparse vegetation, and a distant mountain range silhouetted beneath an orange, pink, and purple sunset sky.

lighting.conditions: Low sunset light casts long warm shadows, rim-lights the rider and horse, and turns airborne dust gold.
lighting.direction: scene-appropriate key light from the most visible practical or natural source
lighting.shadows: soft scene-consistent shadows that ground subjects and objects
lighting.illumination_effect: Low sunset light casts long warm shadows, rim-lights the rider and horse, and turns airborne dust gold.

aesthetics.composition: Epic desert freedom, wind, open scale, glowing sand, rugged textures, and a heroic silhouette against a vivid sky.
aesthetics.color_scheme: colors follow the source prompt and scene materials
aesthetics.mood_atmosphere: Epic desert freedom, wind, open scale, glowing sand, rugged textures, and a heroic silhouette against a vivid sky.

cinematography.camera_motion: Wide cinematic tracking shot moving parallel to the rider, then a slight pullback to reveal mountains and endless desert.
cinematography.focus: main subject and key action remain sharp

artistic_style: Sweeping adventure realism with grand landscape scale and warm sunset color grading.
context: A nomadic rider crosses the Gobi Desert on a chestnut stallion, moving through harsh terrain with determination and freedom.

actions.description: The rider and chestnut stallion enter across golden sand as the sunset burns along the horizon.
The stallion gallops past rocks and sparse vegetation while mane, tail, and garments stream in the wind.
The rider turns his face toward the sun and guides the horse onward beneath the distant mountain silhouette.

segments.description: Introduce the rider and stallion moving across the vast Gobi sands.
segments.key_changes: Dust lifts behind hooves, sunset colors intensify, mountains sit far in silhouette.
segments.camera: Wide side-tracking shot at low height.

segments.description: Follow the horse through uneven sand, rocks, and sparse vegetation.
segments.key_changes: Mane and robe whip in the wind, hooves strike harder ground, dust trails lengthen.
segments.camera: Smooth tracking camera keeping rider centered.

segments.description: Hold on the rider facing the sun as the desert opens around him.
segments.key_changes: Expression reads determined, horse maintains rhythm, horizon expands.
segments.camera: Slight pullback to a grand wide landscape view.

temporal_caption: A determined nomadic rider guides a chestnut stallion across the golden Gobi Desert at sunset, framed by rocks, sparse plants, and distant mountains.
audio_description: Rhythmic hoofbeats on sand, wind across open desert, tack creaks, soft dust movement, and distant empty ambience.
